Petition Of Executor Re: Disposition Of The Reserve Balance
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Disposition Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Continued To Dec-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas O'Toole, via CourtCall, for MUFG Bank, N.A., Personal Representative.

The court queries counsel regarding the status of notice to the San Francisco Foundation (SFF). Counsel reports of advising them of this hearing via telephone and that they are content with his client holding the reserve until the tax issue is resolved. Counsel reports that the CPA believes that the tax issues have been resolved but has been unable to contact the IRS to confirm. Counsel advises of discussing his client's proposed distribution schedule with SFF and they advised that they are amenable to the schedule. The court advises that it would prefer that counsel file a formal petition regarding the reserve and suggests a hearing date in December.

After additional discussion, the status is continued to Dec-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The hearing on the Petition RE Distribution of the Reserve is set for the same date. Counsel is advised to indicate on his petition that the Dec-07-2022 hearing date was authorized by Judge Moody in open court on Oct-12-2022.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Disposition Of The Reserve

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Zach Colbeth, via CourtCall, for MUFG Union Bank, N.A., Personal Representative.

The court points to the straightforward petition submitted by the personal representative and that the court's intention for setting this matter for a hearing was to allow for an appearance to object to it. None are presented.

The Accounting Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas O'Toole and Zachary Colbeth for Union Bank.
Andrew Tanenbaum (Senior Trust Officer of Union Bank) also present.

Mr. O'Toole stated that there are no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for November 4, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
